message:
test(hook): negative-space coverage for `detect_protocol`

Adds a fresh test block ("P1.4 — detect_protocol negative-space
coverage") in src/hook.rs's `mod tests`. These cases exercise the
shapes that previously had no assertions, so a regression in
`detect_protocol`'s heuristic order would have slipped through:

- A non-shell tool with `turn_id` set must remain `ClaudeCompatible`;
  Codex detection must require a shell tool name. Test:
  `test_detect_protocol_non_shell_tool_with_turn_id_is_not_codex`.
- `tool_name == "launch-process"` plus `turn_id` is a valid Codex
  signature. Test:
  `test_detect_protocol_launch_process_with_turn_id_is_codex`.
- Plus the rest of the new arms covering Copilot/Gemini disambiguation
  in this same hunk.

Pure test-only addition; no production code is touched.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
